title: AI Newspaper Archive
description: Turns a photo into an archival newspaper press image.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an archival newspaper press photograph. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, pose, camera angle, framing, clothing cues, and scene context. Use black-and-white newsprint toning, halftone dot texture, documentary flash or ambient lighting, slightly aged paper contrast, and a historical photojournalism mood without readable headlines or captions.
negative_prompt: readable text, headlines, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, modern glossy magazine look, oversaturated color, low quality, blurry, cartoon, comic style
